prompts.title: Quantum Scheduling Module
prompts.instruction: Generate a Node.js module for simulating quantum-based scheduling in a smart factory ERP. Include qubit-based optimization for task allocation and inventory management.

prompts.title: IoT Device Integration
prompts.instruction: Generate backend code to integrate IoT sensors for real-time equipment monitoring. Provide API endpoints to collect, store, and visualize sensor data in the ERP dashboard.

prompts.title: Robotics Automation
prompts.instruction: Generate a robotics control module that integrates robotic arms with ERP production line data. Include functions for task assignment, status updates, and error reporting.

prompts.title: Predictive Maintenance AI
prompts.instruction: Generate a predictive maintenance module using AI to forecast machine failures. Integrate with ERP inventory for spare parts and schedule maintenance automatically.

prompts.title: Smart Energy Management
prompts.instruction: Generate a module for smart energy management in a manufacturing ERP. Optimize power consumption using IoT sensor data and AI algorithms.

prompts.title: Blockchain Supply Chain
prompts.instruction: Generate a backend ERP module for blockchain-based supply chain tracking. Include endpoints to record, verify, and trace inventory from supplier to warehouse.

prompts.title: Digital Twin Simulation
prompts.instruction: Generate a Node.js module to implement digital twin simulations of factory equipment. Include APIs for real-time monitoring and predictive analysis.

prompts.title: AI-Assisted Quality Control
prompts.instruction: Generate a quality control module using AI and IoT camera feeds to detect defects on the production line and log them in ERP.

prompts.title: React Dashboard Component
prompts.instruction: Generate a React dashboard component for ERP inventory module with charts, tables, and API integration to backend.

prompts.title: Login Page React
prompts.instruction: Generate a responsive login page in React with form validation and JWT-based authentication connected to ERP backend.

prompts.title: IoT Data Visualization Page
prompts.instruction: Generate a frontend page in React to display real-time IoT sensor data using charts and tables. Include auto-refresh and API integration.

prompts.title: Robotics Control Panel
prompts.instruction: Generate a React component to display robotic arm statuses and controls. Include API calls to backend ERP robotics endpoints.

prompts.title: Energy Monitoring Dashboard
prompts.instruction: Generate a React page showing smart energy consumption analytics for ERP, integrating with IoT backend sensors.

prompts.title: Digital Twin Visualization
prompts.instruction: Generate a React component to visualize digital twin simulations of factory equipment, showing real-time statuses and predicted outcomes.

prompts.title: AI KPI Dashboard
prompts.instruction: Generate a frontend dashboard displaying AI-generated KPIs for Industry 5.0 manufacturing, including charts for production, energy, and robotics.
